data.title: Dr. DelMauro sees uptick in plastic surgery cases post-GLP-1 weight loss. NYC practice reports surge in patients seeking procedures.
data.description: In New York City on January 21, 2026, Dr. Matthew DelMauro, a plastic surgeon with board certification, has observed a rise in the number of patients pursuing plastic surgery following substantial weight loss related to GLP-1 medications. This surge in patients seeking such procedures comes as a result of the effectiveness of GLP-1 medications in aiding numerous individuals in losing weight.

data.title: ELECFREAKS and sub-brand TOOCAA to showcase CreatAI and STEAM innovation at BETT 2026. Global provider of micro:bit-based STEAM education solutions.
data.description: ELECFREAKS, a prominent global supplier of micro:bit-centered STEAM education solutions, revealed its involvement in the renowned UK education technology expo, BETT 2026, in Shenzhen, China, on January 21, 2026. The company will showcase its offerings alongside its sub-brand.

data.title: Global markets rattled as U.S. stock slump spreads to Asia and Europe, breaking a period of calm.
data.description: On Wednesday, there was a decrease in U.S. stocks which led to a downturn in Asian and European markets, interrupting a recent period of stability.

data.title: Japan restarts world's largest nuclear plant amid anxiety, balancing clean energy demand post-2011 Fukushima Daiichi incident.
data.description: Japan is making a comeback in nuclear power in response to the need for increased clean energy sources. This decision is taken while considering the aftermath of the 2011 Fukushima Daiichi disaster.
